description.default: A religious organization that formed after the great war, dedicated to leading a world without technology.

discoverable.name: The Clergy Reborn
discoverable.info: The Clergy Reborn is the dominating force on the local continent, calling upon kings, lords, vassals, and their subjects at a moment's notice.

discoverable.name: Fanatic Technophobes
discoverable.info: They believe that technology is the root of all evil and that it is their duty to rid the world of it.

discoverable.name: A means to and end
discoverable.info: The Clergy Reborn is known for their strict adherence to their beliefs and their willingness to use violence to achieve their goals.

discoverable.name: Hierarchy
discoverable.info: The Clergy Reborn is led by their Patriarch and Matriarch and a council of high priests and priestesses and are said to be in direct communication with their god.

discoverable.name: Hypocrisy
discoverable.info: Some of the elite leaders of the Clergy Reborn are rumored to be in possession of powerful ancient technology, hiding their hypocrisy from the masses.

discoverable.name: The God of the Clergy Reborn
discoverable.info: Known only to the Patriarch and Matriarch, the god that the council serves is a sentient AI.
